summary: WIN-028 c7-H5 hole (Devil's Sea latitude unanchored) was closed by commit 7b6eef39 prior to analyst pickup; c8 curmudgeon review (WIN-028.c8.json, 2026-05-12T06:43Z) confirmed closure.
